tasks.subject: Task 1: Repo scaffold — README, LICENSE, .gitignore, folders
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create root repo files and empty module directories so the structure is navigable and the repo is safe to make public.

**Files:** README.md, LICENSE (CC BY 4.0), .gitignore, .gitkeep placeholders for the four module dirs.

**Acceptance Criteria:** README has course name + two 25-Jun-2026 slots + audience + cara guna + data-safety note; LICENSE CC BY 4.0 attributed to Dr. Muhammad Naufal bin Nordin; .gitignore covers docx/.idea/.venv/*.pbix/~$*/.DS_Store/Thumbs.db; four module dirs tracked.

**Verify:** `ls README.md LICENSE .gitignore && git check-ignore "surat jemputan peserta.docx"`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "LICENSE", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "ls README.md LICENSE .gitignore && git check-ignore \"surat jemputan peserta.docx\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README course+slots+cara guna", "data-safety note", "LICENSE CC BY 4.0", "gitignore cruft", "four dirs tracked"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Pre-course setup guide (00-persediaan/README.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Guide participants follow before 25 Jun so they arrive with Power BI Desktop installed and a Google account ready.

**Files:** Create 00-persediaan/README.md; delete .gitkeep.

**Acceptance Criteria:** install via Store + installer with admin/IT note; semakan berjaya step; Google sign-in for NotebookLM+Gemini; pre-course checklist; note no real patient data needed.

**Verify:** `test -f 00-persediaan/README.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["00-persediaan/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f 00-persediaan/README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["install Store+installer+IT note", "semakan berjaya", "Google sign-in", "checklist", "no real data note"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Synthetic medical-records dataset (generator + CSVs)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reproducible synthetic star-schema dataset whose columns make every Module 1 measure computable.

**Files:** modul-1-power-bi/data/jana_data.py + generated kemasukan/wad/disiplin/tarikh.csv; delete .gitkeep.

**Acceptance Criteria:** stdlib + fixed seed deterministic; kemasukan.csv schema + >=2000 rows + discharge>=admit + valid FKs; wad.csv capacity>0; disiplin.csv >=5; tarikh.csv one row/day; byte-identical re-run.

**Verify:** run jana_data.py twice, diff kemasukan.csv, assert rows>=2000 and discharge>=admit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-1-power-bi/data/jana_data.py", "modul-1-power-bi/data/kemasukan.csv", "modul-1-power-bi/data/wad.csv", "modul-1-power-bi/data/disiplin.csv", "modul-1-power-bi/data/tarikh.csv"], "verifyCommand": "cd modul-1-power-bi/data && python jana_data.py && cp kemasukan.csv /tmp/k1.csv && python jana_data.py && diff kemasukan.csv /tmp/k1.csv", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deterministic stdlib", "kemasukan schema/rows/FK/date order", "wad capacity>0", "disiplin>=5", "tarikh per day", "byte-identical rerun"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Module 1 — Power BI content (README + 7 lab files)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Power BI intro-lecture README + seven numbered lab steps to build an interactive medical-statistics dashboard from the synthetic dataset, replayable unaided.

**Files:** modul-1-power-bi/README.md + lab/01..07.md; delete .gitkeep.

**Acceptance Criteria:** README intro notes + roadmap + times; labs cite exact Task 3 columns; 04 has DAX for all five measures (Jumlah Kemasukan, Jumlah Discaj, BOR %, ALOS, Bilangan Pesakit ikut Wad); 05 cards+2 bars+line; 06 page + 3 slicers; every lab has Hasil yang dijangka; screenshot placeholders only.

**Verify:** `ls modul-1-power-bi/lab/*.md | wc -l` → 7

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-1-power-bi/README.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/01-import-data.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/02-power-query-bersih.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/03-model-hubungan.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/04-ukuran-dax.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/05-visual-asas.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/06-dashboard-interaktif.md", "modul-1-power-bi/lab/07-eksport-simpan.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls modul-1-power-bi/lab/*.md | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README notes+roadmap", "exact columns", "five measures DAX", "visuals cards+2bar+line", "dashboard+3 slicers", "Hasil each lab", "screenshot placeholders"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Module 2 — NotebookLM & Gemini content (README + 5 labs + rujukan-awam.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AI module: intro README, three core workflow walkthroughs + explore section, curated public KKM/JPA document links.

**Files:** modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/README.md + rujukan-awam.md + lab/01..05.md; delete .gitkeep.

**Acceptance Criteria:** README NotebookLM vs Gemini + amaran data sensitif box; 02 tanya korpus + citation verify; 03 kertas projek→slaid via Studio+Gemini (UI evolves note); 04 audio→minit mesyuarat; 05 Audio Overview/FAQ/Study Guide/Mind Map/Gemini; rujukan-awam public links + access dates + caveat + BYO; every lab Hasil + data-safety reminder.

**Verify:** `ls modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/*.md | wc -l` → 5

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/README.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/rujukan-awam.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/01-sediakan-notebook.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/02-tanya-korpus.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/03-kertas-projek-ke-slaid.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/04-audio-mesyuarat-ke-minit.md", "modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/05-explore-lanjut.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls modul-2-notebooklm-gemini/lab/*.md | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README NotebookLM vs Gemini + amaran", "tanya korpus+citation", "kertas projek to slaid", "audio to minit", "explore features", "rujukan-awam links+dates+caveat", "Hasil+safety each lab"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
